en.extract:
The Rennell white-eye (Zosterops rennellianus) or  the bare-ringed white-eye, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Rennell Island in the Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''Rennell white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops rennellianus''''') or  the '''bare-ringed white-eye''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Rennell Island]] in the [[Solomon Islands]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
